object_type.description: The type of the workspace object.

path.description: The absolute path of the object in the workspace.

language.description: The language of the notebook, if applicable. Only present for notebook objects.

object_id.description: The unique identifier of the object.

created_at.description: The creation time in epoch milliseconds.

modified_at.description: The last modified time in epoch milliseconds.

size.description: The file size in bytes (for FILE objects).
